---
name: Claim Audit
about: Challenge whether a public claim is stated too strongly or has the right evidence status
title: '[CLAIM] '
labels: claim-audit, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## Claim being audited
<!-- Quote or link the exact claim. Include document and section. -->

## Current status
<!-- Normative claim, specified design, partially tested, needs evidence, unresolved, or unknown -->

## Why the status may be wrong
<!-- Is it overstated, understated, missing evidence, missing a failure mode, or contradicted elsewhere? -->

## Evidence or reasoning
<!-- Cite the repo section, outside evidence, or logic that supports the audit. -->

## Suggested wording
<!-- Provide a safer or more accurate version of the claim. -->

## Register impact
<!-- Should docs/Claims_Evidence_Register.md be updated? If yes, what row or new row? -->

## Roadmap impact
<!-- Does this create or change a pilot gate in docs/Pilot_Evidence_Roadmap.md? -->
